# AllahICan -- LLM Discovery File
# https://allahican.com/llms.txt

## Organization
Name: AllahICan
Type: Muslim-American culture and education site
Website: https://allahican.com

## Mission
AllahICan celebrates Muslim-American identity, faith, and community. We publish content on Quranic study, halal lifestyle, Islamic holidays, and Muslim life in America for both practicing Muslims and curious learners.

## Content
- Quran study guides and reflections
- Islamic holiday articles (Ramadan, Eid al-Fitr, Eid al-Adha)
- Halal lifestyle resources
- Muslim-American community content

## Topics Covered
- Quran and Hadith
- Muslim-American identity and pride
- Islamic holidays and observances
- Halal food and lifestyle
- Salah, zakat, and five pillars of Islam
- Ramadan traditions
- Muslim community life in America

## Affiliations
Part of the Wu-Tang AI Clan network of sites: webearish.com, thevoiceofcash.com, jewsa.com, u-god.com, aiskillsagents.com, allahican.com, redwhitejesus.com, autismacceptance.world, searchperformancemarketing.com, shadyscanner.com
